password.tooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters
password.sameAsCurrent: New password must differ from the current one

amount.positive: Amount must be greater than zero

wallet.duplicateName: A wallet with this name already exists

fixedExpense.duplicateName: A fixed expense with this name already exists

snapshot.entriesRequired: Provide a balance for at least one wallet
snapshot.entriesTooMany: Too many wallets in a single snapshot
snapshot.duplicateWallet: Wallet repeated in the same snapshot
snapshot.unknownWallet: Wallet does not belong to this group

errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_USED: This email is already in use
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: The link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission for this action
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.PASSWORD_SAME_AS_CURRENT: New password must differ from the current one
errors.FX_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: Exchange rate service is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.

forgot.title: Recover password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send instructions
forgot.sent: If the email exists, you'll receive instructions shortly.

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account
reset.success: Password reset. You can sign in now.

invite.title: Accept invite
invite.subtitle: You've been invited to a finance group

empty.noGroup: Select or create a group to view the dashboard.

fallback.warning: Conversion to {requested} is currently unavailable. Showing values in {base}.

current.title: Current net worth
current.subtitle: Total balance converted to the group's base currency.

delta.title: Change vs. previous snapshot
delta.subtitle: Difference between the last and second-to-last snapshots.
delta.noPrevious: Record one more snapshot to compute the change.
delta.currencyMismatch: Comparison unavailable: base currency changed between snapshots.

history.title: Recent history
history.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No points} =1 {Last snapshot} other {Last # snapshots}}.
history.needMore: A chart will appear once there are at least 2 snapshots.

checklist.title: Monthly checklist
checklist.subtitle: Fixed expenses marked as paid in {yearMonth}.
checklist.empty: No fixed expenses registered for this group.

profile.title: Profile data
profile.subtitle: This information appears on your account

password.title: Change password
password.subtitle: Use a strong, unique password
password.revokeWarning: Changing your password ends all active sessions — you'll need to sign in again.

empty.title: No active group
empty.subtitle: Create a group to start organizing your finances.

details.title: Group details
details.subtitle: Name and base currency used in the group's reports
details.name: Name
details.archiveConfirm: Archive the group "{name}"? This hides the group from the list but keeps the history.

create.title: New group
create.subtitle: You will be the owner of the new group.
create.name: Name

invites.title: Pending invites
invites.subtitle: Generate an invite link with the desired role. The token expires in 7 days.
invites.tokenGenerated: Invite created for {email}. Copy the token below and send it to the person:
invites.tokenHint: This token won't be shown again. For security, we don't store it in plain text.

wallets.title: Wallets
wallets.subtitle: Accounts, cards, and investments for the active group.

empty.noGroup: Select or create a group before adding wallets.
empty.noWallets: No wallets yet. Create your first one to get started.

create.title: New wallet
create.subtitle: Provide name, type, currency and initial balance.

edit.title: Edit wallet
edit.subtitle: Update name, type, currency, or initial balance.

fields.name: Name
fields.initialBalanceHint: Current balance in this wallet at registration time. Use dot as decimal separator.

actions.archiveConfirm: Archive wallet "{name}"? You can restore it later.

new.title: New snapshot
new.subtitle: Record the current balances of your active wallets. Amounts in a currency other than the base ({baseCurrency}) are converted automatically.

list.title: Snapshots
list.subtitle: Balance history recorded for the active group.
list.empty: No snapshots recorded yet. Create the first one to start tracking how things change.

delta.title: Change vs. previous snapshot
delta.none: This is the oldest snapshot for the group. No comparison is available.

delete.confirm: Delete the snapshot of {date}? This action cannot be undone.

empty.noGroup: Select or create a group before recording a snapshot.
empty.noWallets: Create at least one wallet before recording a snapshot.
empty.viewer: Your role in this group is read-only. Ask a member to create the snapshot.

fields.noteHint: Optional — describe the context of the snapshot (e.g. "April close").

balances.title: Balances
balances.subtitle: Leave blank any wallets you don't want to include in this snapshot.

success.message: Snapshot recorded: {count, plural, =1 {# wallet} other {# wallets}} · total {total} {currency}

fixedExpenses.title: Fixed expenses
fixedExpenses.subtitle: Track recurring bills so you don't forget to pay them — this doesn't affect balances.

empty.noGroup: Select or create a group before adding fixed expenses.
empty.noExpenses: No fixed expenses yet. Create the first one to get started.

create.title: New fixed expense
create.subtitle: Provide name, expected amount, currency and day of month.

fields.name: Name
fields.dayOfMonthHint: Between 1 and 31. For shorter months, treat this as "on or before this day".

actions.archiveConfirm: Archive expense "{name}"? It disappears from the list and checklist, but history is kept.

checklist.title: Monthly checklist
checklist.subtitle: Check off the expenses you've already paid this month.
checklist.empty: No fixed expenses registered for this group yet. Add some to start using the checklist.

totals.title: Totals
totals.legend: Format: paid / expected, grouped by currency.

empty.noGroup: Select or create a group before downloading reports.

snapshots.title: Snapshot series
snapshots.description: One row per group snapshot, with total in base currency. Leave dates blank to export all.

snapshotEntries.title: Entries of a snapshot
snapshotEntries.description: Wallet detail for a specific snapshot, with FX rates and converted amounts.

fixedExpenses.title: Fixed expenses checklist
fixedExpenses.description: For the selected month, which expenses were marked as paid and which remain pending.
